column8: SWITCH; CALCULATE; SUM; AVERAGE; MAX; FORMAT; IF; SELECTEDVALUE; EOMONTH; DAY; ALL; BLANK; MONTH
column11:
VAR PreMaxDate = CALCULATE(MAX(Discharge[Discharge_Date]),ALL('Metric Table'))
VAR LatestDate = DAY(PreMaxDate)
VAR MaxDate = IF(LatestDate<=10,EOMONTH(PreMaxDate,-1),PreMaxDate)
VAR CurrentMonth =  CALCULATE(FORMAT(MaxDate,"YYYYMM"), ALL('Metric Table'))
VAR LastDayofMonth = DAY(MaxDate)
RETURN 
SWITCH(MAX('Metric Table'[Metric Key]),
    18, CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]), Budget[Year_Month] = CurrentMonth, Budget[Metric] = "Admissions"),
    2,CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric]="Discharges"),
    3,CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric]="Patient Days"),
    1,CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric]="Average Daily Census"),
    // 4,if(SELECTEDVALUE('Metric Table'[Entity Display PD]) in {"WCMC","CMC"},
    4,FORMAT(CALCULATE(AVERAGE(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric]="Average Length of Stay"),"#.00"), 
        // FORMAT(5.24,"#.00")),
    5, if(SELECTEDVALUE('Metric Table'[Entity Display PD]) = "BHC",FORMAT(5.68,"0.00"),
        if(SELECTEDVALUE('Metric Table'[Entity Display PD]) = "CMC/WC",BLANK(),FORMAT(4.13,"0.00"))),
    6, FORMAT(1.24,"0.00"),
    7,CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric]IN {"ED Visits - Inpatient", "ED Visits - Outpatient"}),
    8,CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric] in {"Surgical Procedures - Inpatient"}),
    16,CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric] in {"Surgical Procedures - Outpatient"}),
    17,CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric] in {"Surgical Procedures - Inpatient","Surgical Procedures - Outpatient"}),
    9,BLANK(),
    10,BLANK(),
    11,CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth ,Budget[Metric]="wRVU"),
    12,BLANK(),
    13,FORMAT(CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric] in {"Charges-Inpatient","Charges-Outpatient"})/1000,"$ #,###"),
    14,FORMAT(CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric]="Collections")/1000,"$ #,###"),
    15,FORMAT(CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric]="Patient Days")/
            CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric]="Discharges"),"#.00"))

column8: CALCULATE; MAX; IF; EOMONTH; DAY; ALL; MONTH
column11:
VAR PreMaxDate = CALCULATE(MAX(Discharge[Discharge_Date]),ALL('Metric Table'))
VAR LatestDate = DAY(PreMaxDate)
VAR MaxDate = IF(LatestDate<=10,EOMONTH(PreMaxDate,-1),PreMaxDate)
RETURN
DAY(EOMONTH(MaxDate,0)) - DAY(MaxDate)

column8: SWITCH; CALCULATE; SUM; MAX; FORMAT; IF; EOMONTH; DAY; DATESBETWEEN; ALL; BLANK; MONTH
column11:
VAR PreMaxDate = CALCULATE(MAX(Discharge[Discharge_Date]),ALL('Metric Table'))
VAR LatestDate = DAY(PreMaxDate)
VAR MaxDate = IF(LatestDate<=10,EOMONTH(PreMaxDate,-1),PreMaxDate)
VAR MinDate = EOMONTH(MaxDate,-1)+1
VAR Days = DAY(MaxDate)
RETURN 
SWITCH(MAX('Metric Table'[Metric Key]),
    18, CALCULATE(SUM(Admission[Admissions]),DATESBETWEEN(Admission[Admit_Date],MinDate,MaxDate)),
    2,CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate)),
    3,CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Patient_Days]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate)),
    1,CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Patient_Days]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate))/Days,
    4,FORMAT(CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Days]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))/
        CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate)),"#.00"),
    5,FORMAT(CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[Weighted_GLOS_no_Babies]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))/
        CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges_Billed]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate)),"0.00"),
    6,FORMAT((CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Days_MIP]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))/
        CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges_Billed]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate)))/
        (CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[Weighted_GLOS_no_Babies]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))/
        CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges_Billed]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))),"0.00"),
    7,CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[ED_Visits]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate)),
    8,CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Surgical_Procedures]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate),Postdate[Patient_Type]="Inpatient"),
    16,CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Surgical_Procedures]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate),Postdate[Patient_Type]="Outpatient"),
    17,CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Surgical_Procedures]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate)),
    9,BLANK(),
    10,BLANK(),
    11,CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[PN_Weighted_wRVU]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate)),
    12,BLANK(),
    13,FORMAT(CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Charges]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate))/1000,"$ #,###"),
    14,FORMAT(CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Collections]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate))/1000,"$ #,###"),
    15,FORMAT(CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Days_MIP]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))/
        CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges_Billed]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate)),"#.00"))

column8: SWITCH; CALCULATE; SUM; MAX; FORMAT; IF; EOMONTH; DAY; DATESBETWEEN; ALL; BLANK; MONTH
column11:
VAR PreMaxDate = CALCULATE(MAX(Discharge[Discharge_Date]),ALL('Metric Table'))
VAR LatestDate = DAY(PreMaxDate)
VAR MaxDate = IF(LatestDate<=10,EOMONTH(PreMaxDate,-1),PreMaxDate)
VAR MinDate = EOMONTH(MaxDate,-1)+1
VAR _63MinDate = MaxDate - 62
VAR MonthLastDay = Day(EOMONTH(MaxDate,0))
VAR Days = DAY(MaxDate)
VAR RemainingDays = MonthLastDay - Days
RETURN 
SWITCH(MAX('Metric Table'[Metric Key]),
    18,CALCULATE(SUM(Admission[Admissions]),DATESBETWEEN(Admission[Admit_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))+
        ((CALCULATE(SUM(Admission[Admissions]),DATESBETWEEN(Admission[Admit_Date],_63MinDate,MaxDate))/63)*RemainingDays),
    2,CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))+
        ((CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],_63MinDate,MaxDate))/63)*RemainingDays),
    3,CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Patient_Days]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate))+
        ((CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Patient_Days]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],_63MinDate,MaxDate))/63)*RemainingDays),
    1,(CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Patient_Days]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate))+
        ((CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Patient_Days]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],_63MinDate,MaxDate))/63)*RemainingDays))/MonthLastDay,
    4,FORMAT(((CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Days]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))+
        ((CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Days]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],_63MinDate,MaxDate))/63)*RemainingDays))/
        (CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))+
        ((CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],_63MinDate,MaxDate))/63)*RemainingDays))),"#.00"),
    5,FORMAT(((CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[Weighted_GLOS_no_Babies]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))+
        ((CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[Weighted_GLOS_no_Babies]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],_63MinDate,MaxDate))/63)*RemainingDays))/
        (CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges_Billed]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))+
        ((CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges_Billed]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],_63MinDate,MaxDate))/63)*RemainingDays))),"#.00"),
    6,FORMAT(((CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Days_MIP]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))+
        ((CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Days_MIP]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],_63MinDate,MaxDate))/63)*RemainingDays))/
        (CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))+
        ((CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],_63MinDate,MaxDate))/63)*RemainingDays)))
        /((CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[Weighted_GLOS_no_Babies]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))+
        ((CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[Weighted_GLOS_no_Babies]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],_63MinDate,MaxDate))/63)*RemainingDays))/
        (CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges_Billed]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))+
        ((CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges_Billed]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],_63MinDate,MaxDate))/63)*RemainingDays)))
        ,"0.00"),
    7,CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[ED_Visits]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate))+
        CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[ED_Visits]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],_63MinDate,MaxDate))/63*RemainingDays,
    8,CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Surgical_Procedures]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate),Postdate[Patient_Type]="Inpatient")+
        CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Surgical_Procedures]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],_63MinDate,MaxDate),Postdate[Patient_Type]="Inpatient")/63*RemainingDays,
    16,CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Surgical_Procedures]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate),Postdate[Patient_Type]="Outpatient")+
        CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Surgical_Procedures]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],_63MinDate,MaxDate),Postdate[Patient_Type]="Outpatient")/63*RemainingDays,
    17,CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Surgical_Procedures]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate))+
        CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Surgical_Procedures]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],_63MinDate,MaxDate))/63*RemainingDays,
    9,BLANK(),
    10,BLANK(),
    11,CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[PN_Weighted_wRVU]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate))+
        CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[PN_Weighted_wRVU]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],_63MinDate,MaxDate))/63*RemainingDays,
    12,BLANK(),
    13,FORMAT((CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Charges]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate))+
        CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Charges]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],_63MinDate,MaxDate))/63*RemainingDays)/1000,"$ #,###"),
    14,FORMAT((CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Collections]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate))+
        CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Collections]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],_63MinDate,MaxDate))/63*RemainingDays)/1000,"$ #,###"),
    15,FORMAT(((CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Days_MIP]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))+
        ((CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Days_MIP]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],_63MinDate,MaxDate))/63)*RemainingDays))/
        (CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))+
        ((CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],_63MinDate,MaxDate))/63)*RemainingDays))),"#.00"))

        CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges_Billed]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate)),"0.00"),
    6,FORMAT((CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Days_MIP]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))/
        CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges_Billed]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate)))/
        (CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[Weighted_GLOS_no_Babies]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))/
        CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges_Billed]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))),"0.00"),
    7,CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[ED_Visits]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate)),
    7,CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[ED_Visits]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate)),
    8,CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Surgical_Procedures]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate),Postdate[Patient_Type]="Inpatient"),
    16,CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Surgical_Procedures]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate),Postdate[Patient_Type]="Outpatient"),
    17,CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Surgical_Procedures]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate)),
    9,BLANK(),
    10,BLANK(),
    11,CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[PN_Weighted_wRVU]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate)),
    12,BLANK(),
    13,FORMAT(CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Charges]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate))/1000,"$ #,###"),
    14,FORMAT(CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Collections]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate))/1000,"$ #,###"),
    15,FORMAT(CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Days_MIP]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))/
        CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges_Billed]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate)),"#.00"))

column8: SWITCH; CALCULATE; SUM; MAX; FORMAT; IF; EOMONTH; DAY; DATESBETWEEN; ALL; BLANK; MONTH

VAR PreMaxDate = CALCULATE(MAX(Discharge[Discharge_Date]),ALL('Metric Table'))
VAR LatestDate = EOMONTH(PreMaxDate,0)
VAR MaxDate = IF(PreMaxDate < LatestDate,EOMONTH(PreMaxDate,-1),PreMaxDate)
VAR MinDate = EOMONTH(MaxDate,-1)+1
VAR Days = DAY(MaxDate)
RETURN 
SWITCH(MAX('Metric Table'[Metric Key]),
    18,CALCULATE(SUM(Admission[Admissions]),DATESBETWEEN(Admission[Admit_Date],MinDate,MaxDate)),
    2,CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate)),
    3,CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Patient_Days]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate)),
    1,CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Patient_Days]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate))/Days,
    4,FORMAT(CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Days]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))/
        CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate)),"0.00"),
    5,FORMAT(CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[Weighted_GLOS_no_Babies]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))/
        CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges_Billed]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate)),"0.00"),
    6,FORMAT((CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Days_MIP]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))/
        CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges_Billed]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate)))/
        (CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[Weighted_GLOS_no_Babies]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))/
        CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges_Billed]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))),"0.00"),
    7,CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[ED_Visits]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate)),
    8,CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Surgical_Procedures]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate),Postdate[Patient_Type] = "Inpatient"),
    16,CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Surgical_Procedures]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate),Postdate[Patient_Type] = "Outpatient"),
    9,BLANK(),
    10,BLANK(),
    11,CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[PN_Weighted_wRVU]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate)),
    12,BLANK(),
    13,FORMAT(CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Charges]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate))/1000,"$ #,###"),
    14,FORMAT(CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Collections]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate))/1000,"$ #,###"))

column8: SWITCH; CALCULATE; SUM; AVERAGE; MAX; FORMAT; IF; EOMONTH; DAY; ALL; BLANK; MONTH
column11:
VAR PreMaxDate = CALCULATE(MAX(Discharge[Discharge_Date]),ALL('Metric Table'))
VAR LatestDate = EOMONTH(PreMaxDate,0)
VAR MaxDate = IF(PreMaxDate < LatestDate,EOMONTH(PreMaxDate,-1),PreMaxDate)
VAR CurrentMonth =  CALCULATE(FORMAT(MaxDate,"YYYYMM"), ALL('Metric Table'))
VAR LastDayofMonth = DAY(MaxDate)
RETURN 
SWITCH(MAX('Metric Table'[Metric Key]),
    18, CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]), Budget[Year_Month] = CurrentMonth, Budget[Metric] = "Admissions"),
    2,CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric]="Discharges"),
    3,CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric]="Patient Days"),
    1,CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric]="Average Daily Census"),
    4,FORMAT(CALCULATE(AVERAGE(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric]="Average Length of Stay"),"0.00"),
    5, FORMAT(4.13,"0.00"),
    6, FORMAT(1.24,"0.00"),
    7,CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric]="ED Visits"),
    8,CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric] in {"Surgical Procedures - Inpatient"}),
    16,CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric] in {"Surgical Procedures - Outpatient"}),
    9,BLANK(),
    10,BLANK(),
    11,CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth ,Budget[Metric]="wRVU"),
    12,BLANK(),
    13,FORMAT(CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric] in {"Charges-Inpatient","Charges-Outpatient"})/1000,"$ #,###"),
    14,FORMAT(CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric]="Collections")/1000,"$ #,###"))

                    IF(MAX('Metric Table'[Metric Key]) = 5,BLANK(),
                    [MTD Actual] - [Budget Actual]))

column8: DIVIDE
column11: DIVIDE([Variance Actual],[Budget Actual],0)

column8: SWITCH; CALCULATE; SUM; MAX; FORMAT; IF; EOMONTH; EDATE; DAY; DATESBETWEEN; ALL; BLANK; MONTH; DATE
column11:
VAR PreMaxDate = EDATE(CALCULATE(MAX(Discharge[Discharge_Date]),ALL('Metric Table')),-12)
VAR LatestDate = EOMONTH(PreMaxDate,0)
VAR MaxDate = IF(PreMaxDate < LatestDate,EOMONTH(PreMaxDate,-1),PreMaxDate)
VAR MinDate = EOMONTH(MaxDate,-1)+1
VAR Days = DAY(MaxDate)
RETURN 
SWITCH(MAX('Metric Table'[Metric Key]),
    18,CALCULATE(SUM(Admission[Admissions]),DATESBETWEEN(Admission[Admit_Date],MinDate,MaxDate)),
    2,CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate)),
    3,CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Patient_Days]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate)),
    1,CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Patient_Days]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate))/Days,
    4,FORMAT(CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Days]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))/
        CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate)),"0.00"),
    5,FORMAT(CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[Weighted_GLOS_no_Babies]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))/
        CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges_Billed]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate)),"0.00"),
    6,FORMAT((CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Days_MIP]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))/
        CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges_Billed]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate)))/
        (CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[Weighted_GLOS_no_Babies]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))/
        CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges_Billed]),DATESBETWEEN(Discharge[Discharge_Date],MinDate,MaxDate))),"0.00"),
    7,CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[ED_Visits]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate)),
    8,CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Surgical_Procedures]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate),Postdate[Patient_Type] = "Inpatient"),
    16,CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Surgical_Procedures]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate),Postdate[Patient_Type] = "Outpatient"),
    9,BLANK(),
    10,BLANK(),
    11,CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[PN_Weighted_wRVU]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate)),
    12,BLANK(),
    13,FORMAT(CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Charges]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate))/1000,"$ #,###"),
    14,FORMAT(CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Collections]),DATESBETWEEN(Postdate[Date],MinDate,MaxDate))/1000,"$ #,###"))

IF(MAX('Metric Table'[Metric Key]) in {4,6},
            IF(MAX('Metric Table'[Metric Current Seq])=12,[MTD Actual]-[Budget Actual], [Budget Actual] - [MTD Actual]),
                        IF(MAX('Metric Table'[Metric Key])=5,0,

IF(MAX('Metric Table'[Metric Key]) in {4,6},
                            IF(MAX('Metric Table'[Metric Current Seq])=12,[MTD Actual]-[PY Actual],

                            IF(MAX('Metric Table'[Metric Key])=5,0,

RETURN

column8: CALCULATE; MAX; IF; EOMONTH; DAY; ALL; MONTH
column11:
VAR PreMaxDate = CALCULATE(MAX(Discharge[Discharge_Date]),ALL('Metric Table'))
VAR LatestDate = DAY(PreMaxDate)
VAR MaxDate = IF(LatestDate<=10,EOMONTH(PreMaxDate,-1),PreMaxDate)
VAR MinDate = EOMONTH(MaxDate,-1)+1
VAR Days = DAY(MaxDate)
RETURN
"MinDate: "&MinDate&" MaxDate: "&MaxDate

column8: CALCULATE; MAX; IF; EOMONTH; DAY; ALL; MONTH; DATE
column11:
VAR PreMaxDate = EOMONTH(CALCULATE(DATE(2025,09,28),ALL('Metric Table')),-12)+1
VAR LatestDate = DAY(PreMaxDate)
VAR MaxDate = IF(LatestDate<=10,EOMONTH(PreMaxDate,-1),PreMaxDate)
VAR MinDate = EOMONTH(MaxDate,-1)+1
VAR Days = DAY(MaxDate)
VAR MaxDischargeDate = MAX(Discharge[Discharge_Date])
RETURN 
     "MaxDisDate :"&MaxDischargeDate&" MinDate: "&MinDate&" MaxDate: "&MaxDate

"MinDate: "&MinDate&" MaxDate: "&MaxDate

column8: SWITCH; CALCULATE; SUM; MAX
column11:
SWITCH(MAX('Metric Table'[Metric Key]),
3, CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Patient_Days])),
28, CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Observation_Days]), Postdate[Patient_Type] = "Inpatient"),
29, CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Observation_Days]), Postdate[Patient_Type] = "Outpatient"),
30, CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Observation_Days])),
7, CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[ED_Visits])),
11, CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[PN_Weighted_wRVU])),
8, CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Surgical_Procedures]), Postdate[Patient_Type] = "Inpatient"),
16, CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Surgical_Procedures]), Postdate[Patient_Type] = "Outpatient"),
17, CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Surgical_Procedures])),
19, CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Deliveries])),
20, CALCULATE(SUM(Postdate[Trauma_Visits])))

column8: SWITCH; CALCULATE; SUM; MAX; FORMAT; DIVIDE
column11:
SWITCH(MAX('Metric Table'[Metric Key]),
4, FORMAT(CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Days]))/
        CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges])),"#.00"),
21, CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Days])),
2, CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges])),
31, CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[Observation_Cases]), Discharge[Patient_Type] = "Inpatient"),
32, CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[Observation_Cases]), Discharge[Patient_Type] = "Outpatient"),
33, CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[Observation_Cases])), 
34, CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[Outpatient_Cases])),
35, CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[Outpatient_Visits])),
27, FORMAT(DIVIDE(CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Days_MIP])),
        CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges_Billed]))),"#.00"),
5, FORMAT(DIVIDE(CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[Weighted_GLOS_no_Babies])),
        CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges_Billed]))),"0.00"),
6, FORMAT(DIVIDE((CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Days_MIP]))/
        CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges_Billed]))),
        (CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[Weighted_GLOS_no_Babies]))/
        CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges_Billed])))),"0.00"),
22, FORMAT(DIVIDE(SUM(Discharge[MS_DRG_Weight_Billed_no_Babies]), SUM(Discharge[JMH_Discharges])), "0.00"),
23, CALCULATE(SUM(Discharge[NICU_Discharges])))

column8: SWITCH; CALCULATE; SUM; MAX; FORMAT; DIVIDE
column11:
SWITCH(MAX('Metric Table'[Metric Key]),
18, CALCULATE(SUM(Admission[Admissions])),
24, CALCULATE(SUM(Admission[Admissions_ED])),
25, FORMAT(DIVIDE(CALCULATE(SUM(Admission[Admissions_ED])), CALCULATE(SUM(Admission[Admissions]))), "0%"),
26, CALCULATE(SUM(Admission[Admissions_Newborns])))

column8: SWITCH; CALCULATE; SUM; AVERAGE; MAX; FORMAT; IF; SELECTEDVALUE; EOMONTH; DAY; ALL; BLANK; MONTH
column11:
VAR PreMaxDate = CALCULATE(MAX(Discharge[Discharge_Date]),ALL('Metric Table'))
VAR LatestDate = DAY(PreMaxDate)
VAR MaxDate = IF(LatestDate<=10,EOMONTH(PreMaxDate,-1),PreMaxDate)
VAR CurrentMonth =  CALCULATE(FORMAT(MaxDate,"YYYYMM"), ALL('Metric Table'))
VAR LastDayofMonth = DAY(MaxDate)
RETURN 
SWITCH(MAX('Metric Table'[Metric Key]),
    18, CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]), Budget[Year_Month] = CurrentMonth, Budget[Metric] = "Admissions"),
    2,CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric]="Discharges"),
    3,CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric]="Patient Days"),
    1,CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric]="Average Daily Census"),
    // 4,if(SELECTEDVALUE('Metric Table'[Entity Display PD]) in {"WCMC","CMC"},
    4,CALCULATE(AVERAGE(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric]="Average Length of Stay"), 
        // FORMAT(5.24,"#.00")),
    5, if(SELECTEDVALUE('Metric Table'[Entity Display PD]) = "BHC",FORMAT(5.68,"0.00"),
        if(SELECTEDVALUE('Metric Table'[Entity Display PD]) = "CMC/WC",BLANK(),FORMAT(4.13,"0.00"))),
    6, FORMAT(1.24,"0.00"),
    7,CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric]IN {"ED Visits - Inpatient", "ED Visits - Outpatient"}),
    8,CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric] in {"Surgical Procedures - Inpatient"}),
    16,CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric] in {"Surgical Procedures - Outpatient"}),
    17,CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric] in {"Surgical Procedures - Inpatient","Surgical Procedures - Outpatient"}),
    9,BLANK(),
    10,BLANK(),
    11,CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth ,Budget[Metric]="wRVU"),
    12,BLANK(),
    13,CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric] in {"Charges-Inpatient","Charges-Outpatient"})/1000,
    14,CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric]="Collections")/1000,
    15,CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric]="Patient Days")/
            CALCULATE(SUM(Budget[Amount]),Budget[Year_Month]=CurrentMonth,Budget[Metric]="Discharges"))
